THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDOVINOS-VARGAS, GILDARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, SAVINBON R. JORDAN, DAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEF'S HOTEL SENECA & PATEL RAMANBHAL. DISMISS W/O PORJUDICE DEFT PATEL SANVIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
